description: Style NoteThis summer is the season of mixing it up with fusion fashion - creations by mineral are spot on when it comes to that elusive cohesive combination of trends. This top is perfect for the contemporary woman who knows how to make head turn without losing her cool. Modern and innovative design details sets this piece above the rest. Product DescriptionDark pink sleeveless top, has a V neckline, lace panel on the yoke, gathers from below the yoke, two layers with the top layer ending before with a lace detail at the hem and the back layer extending from belowMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmTumble dry low Use warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
